text:
希望の戦士オプトレイオン参上！
よーし、はりきっちゃうぞー！

カザミノタチ推参！
師匠のサポートはお任せください！

はりきりすぎて油断するなよ。
ふむ、私は戦況把握に努めるとしよう。
先陣は任せたぞ、
It's the moment you've all been waiting for... Opt Leon is here! Let's get rockin'!
Kazami no Tachi dropping in! You can count on me to back you up.
Don't get too excited and drop your guard, now. Hmph. I'll keep an eye on our situation. You take the front, Leader.
